title: lagarinthus diversus
side_effects: Lagarinthus diversus can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extract may also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. In rare cases, improper use of Lagarinthus diversus can cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and respiratory problems. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing medical conditions, such as kidney or liver disease, may experience worsened symptoms or interactions with other medications.
